name: oh-my-cassette
description: Edit local project media through a self-contained stdio MCP runtime that connects directly to Cassette.

interface.shortDescription: Edit project videos through local MCP
interface.longDescription: Use a local stdio MCP runtime to ingest trusted project media, guide Cassette edits, monitor background jobs, answer follow-up questions, review completion, and return validated export artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Edit this project video with Cassette.
Add captions and background music to this clip.
Continue this Cassette job from its job ID.
